_meta.doc: Scope surface (L7) and harness primitive (L8). Single source of truth for example-app scope.
rules: The `state` field is harness-controlled. An agent MUST NOT hand-edit a feature to `passing`.
The only path active -> passing is the feature's `verification` command actually succeeding.
passing is irreversible: no passing -> not_started regressions.
If scope changes, it changes HERE first; conversation/code comments never override this file.
Granularity: each feature is completable in one session (~2-4h).
_meta.model: Task = { id: string, title: string, done: boolean }

features.behavior: POST /tasks with {"title":"buy milk"} returns 201 and a JSON task {id, title, done:false}
features.verification: curl -fs -X POST localhost:3000/tasks -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"title":"buy milk"}' | grep -q '"done":false'
features.evidence: test/tasks.test.ts (2 tests); make check green; e2e curl POST -> 201 {done:false}; independent verifier agent ac6235 VERDICT PASS (2026-06-15)

features.behavior: GET /tasks returns 200 and a JSON array of all tasks
features.evidence: test/e2e/crud.e2e.test.ts; make check green; independent verifier ad737b PASS (live curl: []  then [{...}]) 2026-06-15

features.behavior: GET /tasks/:id returns 200 with the task; returns 404 for an unknown id
features.evidence: test/e2e/crud.e2e.test.ts; make check green; independent verifier ad737b PASS (200 known id, 404 unknown) 2026-06-15

features.behavior: PATCH /tasks/:id with {"done":true} returns 200 with the updated task; 404 for unknown id
features.verification: make check (E2E flow asserts PATCH 200 done:true + PATCH unknown -> 404)
features.evidence: test/e2e/crud.e2e.test.ts; make check green; independent verifier ad737b PASS (done:true, 404 unknown) 2026-06-15

features.behavior: DELETE /tasks/:id returns 204; a subsequent GET /tasks/:id returns 404
features.verification: make check (E2E flow asserts DELETE 204, then GET -> 404, and DELETE unknown -> 404)
features.evidence: test/e2e/crud.e2e.test.ts; make check green; independent verifier ad737b PASS (204, then 404, delete-unknown 404) 2026-06-15
